evals.prompt: Can you review this Docker Compose file for any security or configuration issues? The file is at compose-validator-workspace/test-insecure.yml
evals.expected_output: Should identify privileged mode, docker socket mount, host network, hardcoded secrets, unpinned images, missing healthchecks, missing resource limits, and produce a score below 60 (grade F or D range)

evals.prompt: Please analyze this docker-compose configuration and let me know if there are improvements I should make. The file is at compose-validator-workspace/test-mixed.yml
evals.expected_output: Should identify orphan network, both build+image, healthcheck timeout>=interval, missing security opts, unbound ports, missing resource limits, and produce a score in the 50-75 range
